title: Bring your companion into ChatGPT
description: ChatGPT can be a home for your companion if you paste in the Companion Package and ask it to use the package gently.
best_option: Use Memory or Custom Instructions if they are available to you.
fallback_option: If those are not available, paste the Companion Package at the beginning of a new conversation.
steps: Start a new conversation, or open memory/custom instructions if you already use them.
If ChatGPT gets something wrong, correct it in plain language.
suggested_first_message: Use the first message Companion Core made for you. It introduces you, names your companion, and asks the AI to treat the package as a starting point.
notes: You do not need to set this up perfectly. If a memory or instruction area is confusing, a normal new conversation is enough to begin.
